blocks.value: Recession Nostalgia
We are now reaching that point in the hypercycle where you look back, see the signs covering the glass, and think…
Is this what the Summer of ’77 felt like, now with attention addiction machines in every pocket?

It seemed easy. Decentralize all of it. Every platform, app, and device we’ve learned to depend on in the mobile web era. Do it quick. Build on the narrative arc given crisp poetic-mathematical voice by Satoshi, to pick up the pieces post-GFC… before the next one comes along. Do it for everything. Don’t just stop and spectate at open source money.
What connects SBF to Musk to the rest of the recent rogues gallery, and a reminder of why we’re here, isn’t so clear. But, should it be?
Maybe it’s too obvious that ads + algorithms run the internet.
It hides in its glare the why and the how of chaos ladder climbers buying humanity’s “town square”, only to tear it all down before anyone in web3 has had the chance to replace it entirely.

Information quality, discoverability, the human connection, how algorithms drive and limit reach, confidence your archives will be available after the next downtime adventure — it all gets noticeably worse by the day. Meanwhile those not yet laid off struggle to remember which microservice keeps the closet lights on.
It leads directly to how SBF can perpetuate the largest false flag banking fraud in history, while we’re all too busy chasing distractions.

And the future promises more beatings until morale improves. Gating off free expression with implicit threats of deranking and political violence at the point of identification. Currencies that can be turned off when you offend or parody the sensibilities that be, wear your hair without a hijab, express solidarity for ZC crackdown protestors, or just plain stumble through the invisible cracks.
Where’s all the wagmi gone?
Let’s return to the principles that got us here so far.
How fast is creative AI moving? Can you really tell how much of this line I wrote? What about how much more is still to come?
We have forgotton too often what we fight for. The entire purpose for decentralization and rights to what’s worth so much that it can’t ever be rescinded.

The thing about the mix of web3 and AI is how it allows each of us to make ideas and desires we’ve held onto into something shareable and real. What we never thought we’d have the time to do, is now faster to make, while we save money, build skills, and create at high quality what would have taken so long to make by hand that we would have instead lost interest over time.

With text to text, text to image, text to video, text to music, text to marketing, text to textiles, and more, we grab hold of the narrative arc, of our timlines and public memory, instead of continuing as passengers.
It’s the narrative to production method to storefront to sales funnel pipeline that replaces the malaise of blaming crypto for the attention-addiction & CeFi machines.
Here’s how this is playing out now and over the coming weeks in the DIGITALAX ecosystem:
DIGIFIZZY vol 2 to be released this month as a 24/7 live stream with a new publication method and a first issue focus on AI &/or Art.
Continued deep integrations of Lens into every corner of the ecosystem, with a redoubled focus on how arweave helps us build memory in public.
A drop management system has been built for IRL web3 fashion realms (Started as a submission to the Chainlink Hackathon and will be released December 2nd).
Today marks the release of the first male web3 fashion synth collections within the ecosystem.

Remember, remember why so many of us got into this to begin with. Empty or full, too often, we don’t have pockets. If that’s too crypto-poetic, remember instead why Vitalik got into building Ethereum. He didn’t have a way to save, in a decentralized public memory permastorage, the assets he earned in latent, virtual, and IRL spaces, or to trade them permissionlessly with who he wanted, when he wanted, for however much he wanted. So he started the ball rolling to build on the Nakamoto consensus blueprint, as a way to carry what we value with us.
Be like Vitalik. Build your own pockets, in fabric and code.

نوستالجيا الركود
We are now reaching that point في ال hypercycle where you look back, see ال signs covering ال glass, و think…
Is this what ال Summer من ’77 felt like, now مع attention addiction machines في every pocket?

It seemed easy. Decentralize all من it. Every platform, app, و device we’ve learned الى depend على في ال mobile web era. Do it quick. Build على ال narrative arc given crisp poetic-mathematical voice by Satoshi, الى pick up ال pieces بوست-GFC… before ال next one comes along. Do it لـ everything. Don’t just stop و spectate at open source money.
What connects SBF الى Musk الى ال rest من ال recent rogues gallery, و a reminder من ليه we’re here, isn’t so clear. But, should it be?
Maybe it’s too obvious that ads + algorithms run ال internet.
It hides في its glare ال ليه و ال ازاي من chaos ladder climbers buying humanity’s “town square”, only الى tear it all down before anyone في web3 has had ال chance الى replace it entirely.

Information quality, discoverability, ال human connection, ازاي algorithms drive و limit reach, confidence your archives will be available after ال next downtime adventure — it all gets noticeably worse by ال day. Meanwhile those not yet laid off struggle الى remember which microservice keeps ال closet lights على.
It leads directly الى ازاي SBF can perpetuate ال largest false flag banking fraud في history, while we’re all too busy chasing distractions.

و ال future promises more beatings until morale improves. Gating off free expression مع implicit threats من deranking و political violence at ال point من identification. Currencies that can be turned off when you offend or parody ال sensibilities that be, wear your hair without a hijab, express solidarity لـ ZC crackdown protestors, or just plain stumble through ال invisible cracks.
Where’s all ال wagmi gone?
Let’s return الى ال principles that got us here so far.
ازاي fast is ابداعي ذكاء اصطناعي moving? Can you really tell ازاي much من this line I wrote? What about ازاي much more is still الى come?
We have forgotton too often what we fight لـ. ال entire purpose لـ decentralization و rights الى what’s worth so much that it can’t ever be rescinded.

ال thing about ال mix من web3 و ذكاء اصطناعي is ازاي it allows each من us الى make ideas و desires we’ve held onto into something shareable و real. What we never thought we’d have ال time الى do, is now faster الى make, while we save money, build skills, و create at high quality what would have taken so long الى make by hand that we would have instead lost interest over time.

مع text الى text, text الى image, text الى video, text الى music, text الى marketing, text الى textiles, و more, we grab hold من ال narrative arc, من our timlines و public memory, instead من continuing as passengers.
It’s ال narrative الى production method الى storefront الى sales funnel pipeline that replaces ال malaise من blaming crypto لـ ال attention-addiction & CeFi machines.
Here’s ازاي this is playing out now و over ال coming weeks في ال DIGITALAX النظام:
DIGIFIZZY vol 2 الى be released this month as a 24/7 live stream مع a جديد publication method و a first issue focus على ذكاء اصطناعي &/or Art.
Continued deep integrations من لينز into every corner من ال النظام, مع a redoubled focus على ازاي arweave helps us build memory في public.
A drop management system has been built لـ IRL web3 فاشون realms (Started as a submission الى ال Chainlink Hackathon و will be released December 2nd).
Today marks ال release من ال first male web3 فاشون synth collections within ال النظام.

Remember, remember ليه so many من us got into this الى begin مع. Empty or full, too often, we don’t have pockets. If that’s too crypto-poetic, remember instead ليه Vitalik got into building Ethereum. He didn’t have a way الى save, في a decentralized public memory permastorage, ال assets he earned في latent, virtual, و IRL spaces, or الى trade them permissionlessly مع who he wanted, when he wanted, لـ however much he wanted. So he started ال ball rolling الى build على ال Nakamoto consensus blueprint, as a way الى carry what we value مع us.
Be like Vitalik. Build your own pockets, في fabric و code.
